# ERCC1:XPF binds DNA DSBs with annealed 3' ssDNA overhangs and displaced flaps generated by SSA
**Reactome ID:** [R-HSA-9980006](https://reactome.org/content/detail/R-HSA-9980006)
**Species:** Homo sapiens

## Summary

The endonuclease complex ERCC1:XPF (ERCC1:ERCC4) is recruited to single strand annealing (SSA) sites of DNA double-strand break (DSB) repair through direct interaction between XPF (ERCC4) and RAD52 (Motycka et al. 2004).
